Chan No. 3 Is the horoscope of a person on whom goddess of
Poverty has smiled abundantly (vide page 417 Notable Horoscopes by
Or. 8. V. Raman). Ohana l.agna falls in Aries. The worst malefic Saturn
occupies this place and hence gets debilitated. Together with this he is
0
afflicted considerably. The combined aspect of the 3' lord and the lt "'
lord together with Ketu has further spoilt the Dhana Lagna. Readers
may well judge for themselves the financial position of the native having
such a Ohana Lagna. These combinations are not good for finance and
the native does not seem to have any luck. whatever the Dasa is.
